recalls.Description: OdorStop is recalling its Boot and Shoe Dryers and Deodorizers, specifically the models OSOBSDD2 and OSOBSDD. These devices, designed to dry and deodorize two to four pairs of boots using high-output fans and a 3-hour timer, may pose a fire hazard due to a potential short circuit in the heat or ozone on-off switch. The model number and brand name can be found on a label located at the bottom of the products.
recalls.Title: OdorStop Boot and Shoe Dryers and Deodorizers Recalled Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach OdorStop LLC at 800-414-2191, Monday through Friday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, or email support@odorstop.com. More information is available at www.OdorStop.com/recall or by visiting the OdorStop website and clicking on the 'Recall' section.

Products.Name: OdorStop Boot and Shoe Dryers and Deodorizers

Images.Caption: Recalled OdorStop Boot and Shoe Dryers and Deodorizers, models OSBSDD2 & OSBSDD

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com, Odorstop.com, Lowes.com, Globalindustrial.com, and webrestaurantstore.com from December 2018 to October 2023, priced between $100 and $130.

Importers.Name: OdorStop LLC, of Hamburg, New York

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to potential short circuit in the heat or ozone switch

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the recalled products immediately and contact OdorStop for a free repair. The company will install a new in-line fuse and return the repaired product to the consumer. To register for the recall and obtain a free return label, visit https://OdorStop.com/recall.

recalls.metaDescription: OdorStop recalls Boot and Shoe Dryers due to fire hazards. Immediate action required for safety and free repairs.
